item.title: TheSundayGame: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 4h 'As championship debuts go, they couldn't be any better' says Walter Walsh (who also
item.description: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 4h 'As championship debuts go, they couldn't be any better' says Walter Walsh (who also had a decent championship debut...) of Galway's young guns, with Aaron Niland, Jason Rabbitte and Rory Burke scoring 3-11 of the overall winning tally 1 44 9 mil
